name: DRS
description: Premier venue for design research, methods, practice, and design-led social change. Good fit for reflective design research, methodology, and design theory papers.

submissions.estimate_basis: DRS is biennial; last paper deadline was roughly one year before the event. Placeholder — check when DRS 2028 CFP opens.

name: MXR
description: Focused on meaningful, reflective, and transformative XR experiences. Good fit for work on emotion, value, and human meaning in VR/AR/MR.

upcomingEvent.name: MXR 2026
upcomingEvent.location: University of Oregon, Portland, OR, USA (hybrid)

submissions.estimate_basis: MXR 2026 CFP closed in early 2026; MXR 2027 CFP not yet announced. Placeholder based on typical winter timing.

name: ISLS/CSCL
fullName: International Society of the Learning Sciences / Computer-Supported Collaborative Learning
description: Flagship venue for learning sciences and CSCL research. Good fit for empirical studies of learning, collaboration, technology-mediated education, and learning analytics.

submissions.estimate_basis: ISLS 2027 CFP not yet announced. Last year (ISLS 2026) papers were due in early October.

name: AERA
fullName: American Educational Research Association Annual Meeting
description: Largest education research conference in the world. Good fit for theoretical, methodological, and empirical education research across K-12, higher ed, and policy.

submissions.estimate_basis: AERA 2027 CFP not yet announced. Last year (AERA 2026) paper submissions were due around late July.

name: CHI
fullName: ACM CHI Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems
description: Top-tier HCI venue. Good fit for rigorous empirical, systems, theory, and design papers on human-computer interaction.

submissions.estimate_basis: CHI 2027 CFP not yet announced. Last year (CHI 2026) papers were due September 11, 2025.

name: DIS
description: HCI + design venue. Good fit for research-through-design, speculative design, and design-oriented HCI papers.

submissions.estimate_basis: DIS 2027 CFP not yet announced. Last year (DIS 2026) papers were due January 17, 2026 (AoE).

name: IDC
description: Premier venue for child-centered HCI. Good fit for technology, design, and empirical research with children and young people.

submissions.estimate_basis: IDC 2027 CFP not yet announced. Last year (IDC 2026) abstract phase was roughly one week before the Jan 27 paper deadline.
IDC 2027 CFP not yet announced. IDC 2026 and IDC 2025 full & short papers were both due January 27 (AoE).

name: AIED
fullName: International Conference on Artificial Intelligence in Education
description: Top venue for AI + learning technologies. Good fit for intelligent tutoring systems, LLMs in education, learning analytics, and adaptive learning.

upcomingEvent.name: AIED 2026
upcomingEvent.location: Coex Center, Seoul, Republic of Korea

submissions.estimate_basis: AIED 2027 main-track CFP has not been announced yet. Do not treat this as a published deadline.

name: Learning@Scale
description: Focused on large-scale learning environments (MOOCs, intelligent tutors, online courses). Good fit for data-driven studies of learning at scale.

submissions.estimate_basis: L@S 2027 CFP not yet announced. Last year (L@S 2026) papers were due around early November.

name: IEEE VR
fullName: IEEE Conference on Virtual Reality and 3D User Interfaces
description: Top virtual reality venue. Good fit for rigorous VR systems, interaction, perception, rendering, and empirical VR studies.

submissions.estimate_basis: IEEE VR 2027 CFP not yet announced. Last year (IEEE VR 2026) abstracts were due early September; papers one week later.
IEEE VR 2027 CFP not yet announced. Last year (IEEE VR 2026) full papers were due around September 10.

name: ISMAR
fullName: IEEE International Symposium on Mixed and Augmented Reality
description: Premier AR/MR venue. Good fit for tracking, displays, rendering, perception, and applications of mixed/augmented reality.

submissions.estimate_basis: ISMAR 2027 CFP not yet announced. Last year (ISMAR 2026) papers were due around March 22, 2026.

name: VRST
fullName: ACM Symposium on Virtual Reality Software and Technology
description: VR/AR software and systems venue. Good fit for novel VR/AR techniques, interaction, rendering, and systems papers.

upcomingEvent.name: VRST 2026
upcomingEvent.location: Research Institute of Electrical Communication, Tohoku University, Sendai, Japan

name: iLearning
description: Applied learning and e-learning venue. Good fit for practitioner-oriented research on learning, training, and educational technology.

submissions.estimate_basis: iLearning 2027 CFP not yet announced. Last year (iLearning 2026) proposals were due December 15, 2025.
